name: crafting
checklist: Spawn at the coast with a lit campfire at your feet, holding Cloth Scraps, Wood Branches, Scrap Metal, Rope, Deer Pelt, and a Hunting Knife.
Open the Tab inventory — a CRAFTING section lists all 8 recipes; rows you can't afford are greyed.
Craft Bandage (2x Cloth Scraps) — cloth drops by 2, you gain Bandage x2, notice 'crafted Bandage'.
Craft Rope (3x Cloth Scraps) — cloth drops by 3, gain Rope x1, notice 'crafted Rope'.
Craft Hunting Knife (2x Scrap Metal, 1x Wood Branches) — gain a second Hunting Knife.
Craft Fishing Rod (2x Wood, 1x Rope, 1x Scrap Metal; needs a Knife) — the three inputs are consumed but the Knife is NOT, and you gain Fishing Rod x1.
Standing in the fire, craft Torch (1x Wood, 1x Cloth) — succeeds. Walk a few steps away and try again — it fails with the notice 'needs a campfire' and consumes nothing.
Craft Padded Jacket (4x Cloth, 2x Deer Pelt, 1x Rope; needs a Knife). Then RESET via the QA panel and craft Canvas Backpack (6x Cloth, 2x Rope; needs a Knife) — RESET restocks the cloth.
Every material + crafted output now shows a rendered icon in the hotbar/CRAFTING list (no colour-swatch fallbacks).
